user_query: I'm planning a surprise birthday party for my best friend next week. Can you suggest some funny jokes and quotes that I can use to entertain the guests? Also, recommend a good cake shop in town where I can order a customized cake for the party. Oh, and don't forget to find some interesting manatee jokes to share with everyone!

TaskList.description: Fetch a collection of funny jokes and quotes suitable for a birthday party.
Search for a cake shop in town that offers customized cakes.
Find and collect manatee-related jokes to entertain the guests.
